2b:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
22:T4e9,{
"name": "mnemosyne_remember",
"description": "Store information in long-term memory. Use for facts, preferences, decisions, and observations that should persist across sessions.",
"parameters": {
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["content"],
  "properties": {
    "content": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "The information to store. Be specific and self-contained."
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "string" },
      "description": "Categorical labels for filtering. Use descriptive tags like 'user-preference', 'api-decision', 'bug-fix'."
    },
    "importance": {
      "type": "number",
      "minimum": 0,
      "maximum": 1,
      "description": "0.0 = transient, 1.0 = critical. High importance memories are promoted to Episodic Memory during consolidation."
    },
    "scope": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["session", "global"],
      "description": "Session-scoped or globally visible."
    },
    "veracity": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["stated", "inferred", "tool", "imported", "unknown"],
      "description": "Confidence level of this memory. Use 'stated' for explicit user statements, 'inferred' for AI deductions, 'tool' for system output. (v2.3)"
    }
  }
}
}
7:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"$22","language":"json"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]
23:T4a3,{
"name": "mnemosyne_recall",
"description": "Retrieve relevant memories from long-term storage. Use when you need context about past interactions, user preferences, or established facts.",
"parameters": {
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["query"],
  "properties": {
    "query": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Natural language description of what you're looking for."
    },
    "top_k": {
      "type": "integer",
      "minimum": 1,
      "maximum": 50,
      "default": 5,
      "description": "Maximum number of memories to retrieve."
    },
    "author_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Filter by specific author. (v2.1)"
    },
    "author_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["human", "agent", "system"],
      "description": "Filter by author category. (v2.1)"
    },
    "channel_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Filter by channel for cross-session recall. (v2.1)"
    },
    "veracity": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["stated", "inferred", "tool", "imported", "unknown"],
      "description": "Filter by confidence level. Useful for retrieving only explicit user statements. (v2.3)"
    }
  }
}
}
9:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"$23","language":"json"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]
b:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_sleep\",\n\"description\": \"Run sleep consolidation to promote Working Memory entries to Episodic and Semantic memory. Triggers summarization and importance-based promotion. Also runs tiered degradation after consolidation. (v2.3)\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {}\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]
d:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_stats\",\n\"description\": \"Get memory system statistics including entry counts across all memory stores, database size, and consolidation status.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {}\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_forget"}]
f:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_forget\",\n\"description\": \"Delete a specific memory by ID. Use when information is wrong, outdated, or explicitly requested to be removed. Unlike invalidate, this permanently removes the memory.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"memory_id\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"memory_id\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The memory ID to permanently delete.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_update"}]
11:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_update\",\n\"description\": \"Update an existing memory's content, importance, or veracity. Only the fields you provide will be changed.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"memory_id\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"memory_id\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The memory ID to update.\"\n    },\n    \"content\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"New content for the memory.\"\n    },\n    \"importance\": {\n      \"type\": \"number\",\n      \"minimum\": 0,\n      \"maximum\": 1,\n      \"description\": \"Updated importance score.\"\n    },\n    \"veracity\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"enum\": [\"stated\", \"inferred\", \"tool\", \"imported\", \"unknown\"],\n      \"description\": \"Update confidence level. Use when promoting an inference to a stated fact. (v2.3)\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}]
13:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_invalidate\",\n\"description\": \"Mark a specific memory as invalidated. Use when information is outdated, incorrect, or explicitly requested to be removed.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"id\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"id\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The memory ID to invalidate.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}]
15:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_add\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact as a subject-predicate-object triple in the temporal knowledge graph. Use for precise, relational knowledge that benefits from graph queries.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"subject\", \"predicate\", \"object\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The entity the fact is about.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The relationship or property. Use consistent predicates for the same concept.\"\n    },\n    \"object\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The value or target entity.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
16:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}]
17:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_query\",\n\"description\": \"Query the temporal knowledge graph for structured facts. Use for precise lookups and relationship traversal.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by subject entity.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by relationship type.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Tool Selection Guide"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":["|| Goal | Tool | Example |\n|------|------|---------|\n| Store general info | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]," | User preferences, decisions |\n| Retrieve context | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]," | \"What did we decide?\" |\n| Consolidate memories | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]," | End-of-session cleanup |\n| Check system health | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]," | Memory counts, DB size |\n| Remove bad data | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}]," | Outdated information |\n| Permanently delete memory | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_forget"}]," | Wrong information, retractions |\n| Update existing memory | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_update"}]," | Correct facts, promote inferences |\n| Store relational facts | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}]," | Team structure, dependencies |\n| Precise lookup | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}]," | \"Who reports to Carol?\" |"]}]
